subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath manifested Himself and sent down the Book, yet most among men remain heedless, having cast it aside [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی اظهر نفسه و انزل الکتاب ولکن الناس اکثرهم من الغافلین قد نبذوا
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @spiritual transformation, @suffering and imprisonment, @knowledge; recognition of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
